summary: Clean green run reported (v0.10.0, 2 stages, 5 implement / 2 review / 1 test rounds, 14 findings: 13 verified + REV-012 accepted-wontfix, zero open). plan.md finalized to as-built (intended design held; 3 deltas: mermaid-ascii -> internal ASCII renderer, single-owner event emitters, the huh routing/binding blocker fixed r5 with live tmux proof). Report bundle per the 0.8.0 slim rule: article-style report.md + flow.mmd (intended chart, confirmed as-built) + NEW sequence.mmd (the move-launches-claude loop: board -> huh confirm -> tmux claude -> events.jsonl -> fsnotify refresh) + manifest.json + before/ (flow.mmd + rewritten manifest) — no diagrams.html. events.jsonl dogfooded through this phase (phase-started/phase-done report lines; 9/9 lines schema-valid). Knowledge reconciled: tech-stack (Go 1.25 cli/ module + Charm deps + build/test cmds), coding-rules (Go gates, injectable launch seams, the value-type bubbletea binding gotcha), testing-tools (go test -race, tmux TUI drive, stubbed-claude PATH), test-strategy (model tests catch logic, only live tmux catches integration — TEST-001), NFRs (ms-startup no-LLM read-path bar; REV-012 second sanctioned mermaid copy), project-knowledge (since-0.10.0 override bullet). state.md -> phase=done, status=done, resume=none.
